padova.childcare: The Padua municipal portal publishes nido enrollment, ISEE-based tariffs, and childcare service information for families.
padova.mobility: Padua urban subscriptions: TU1 EUR42.90 monthly or EUR418 annually; TU2 EUR52.80 monthly or EUR528 annually.
padova.familyBenefits: INPS confirms that Assegno Unico and Bonus asilo nido are national programs rather than city-level allowances.

sanLazzaro.mobility: TPER (Trasporto Passeggeri Emilia-Romagna) is the main transit operator for Bologna and the metropolitan area, including San Lazzaro di Savena. The subscriptions page lists monthly and annual urban and area pass prices.
sanLazzaro.familyBenefits: INPS confirms that Assegno Unico and Bonus asilo nido are national programs rather than city-level allowances.
